sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 18.68 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.18)

statement.latex: What are the nonabelian composition factors of a finite nonsoluble group all of whose maximal subgroups have complements? Note that finite simple groups with all maximal subgroups having complements are, up to isomorphism,$L_2(7)$,$L_2(11)$, and$L_5(2)$(V.\,M.\,Levchuk, A.\,G.\,Likharev, , { 47}, no.\,4 (2006), 659--668). The same groups exhaust finite simple groups with Hall maximal subgroups and...

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
